title: quercus lusitanica subsp. broteroi
intro: Quercus lusitanica subsp. broteroi, also known as Portuguese oak or holm oak, is a subspecies of evergreen tree that belongs to the Quercus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Quercus lusitanica subsp. broteroi include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and respiratory problems.
